name: Fabulous Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Margarine; or Half margarine half butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the melted chocolate.
4. Alternately add combined liquid ingredients with combined dry ingredients.
5. Fold in chopped pecans.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13x9-inch pan.
7. Bake for approximately 40 minutes at 350°F.
8. Note: The cake is delicious without pecans. If desired, use them only in the frosting.
9. Frosting: Melt butter and chocolate together.
10. Add a small amount of melted chocolate to the beaten egg.
11. Stir this back into the chocolate mixture.
12. Mix in vanilla.
13. Gradually add powdered sugar and chopped pecans until combined.
This version maintains the original recipe's title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency throughout.
